Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Elaine Chan's motion to exclude expert witness at trial is denied. The Court finds that the instant motion was brought without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $400 are to be paid to defendants Diverse Inspection Services Inc. and Evan Donaldson within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $880 are to be paid to defendants Peter Wolff Jr. and Lori Ganz within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
